name: Cheddar Bacon Treat
keywords: cheese main dish meats sandwiches vegetables
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the bacon until crisp, then crumble.
2. In a bowl, beat together the cheddar cheese, lemon juice, Worcestershire sauce, paprika, garlic powder, and pepper until fluffy.
3. Add the sour cream and mix well.
4. Divide the mixture evenly onto two slices of bread.
5. Arrange lettuce and tomato on one slice of bread, then top with the remaining bread slices.
6. Serve.
